policy: Per-unit single source of truth: kit-parse rollout status (kitParse.*), tuning provenance (tier/tuned/evidence — absorbed from data/hand-tuned.json 2026-07-16; tier definitions in docs/hand-tuned.md), unmodeled kit text (mirrored from the override), and board pass records (sim/real per recorded comp, >1 = HOT). AUTO fields regenerate via scripts/kit-status.ts --refresh; workflow/evidence fields are preserved. Board ratio convention: docs/CONVENTIONS.md "Ratio direction".

tiers.MEASURED: focus recording / frame-count / gauge-popup read set or confirmed the values
tiers.CALIBRATED: fitted number tuned against real fights (mechanism suspected, value is ours)
tiers.VALIDATED: total graded ~1.0 in a recorded comp (not focus-recorded)
tiers.MODEL_ONLY: parser/datamine only, never confirmed against a real fight = UNTUNED

reference_grade.definition: tuned=true AND final-total ratio within 0.97-1.03 on >=5 distinct teams (dedup by unit set; focus not required). Recompute with scripts/refgrade.ts when graded comps change.
